title: Add Google Maps location finder for pest technicians

requirements.summary: Add Google Maps integration to display technician locations on an interactive map when viewing search results in TechnicianFinder.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: Map displays all technicians from search results with markers at their locations
Map is visible alongside or within the technician search results
Clicking a map marker shows the technician's details

file_operations.description: Create a new component that renders a Google Maps interface using the @react-google-maps/api library. This component accepts an array of technicians with latitude/longitude coordinates and displays map markers for each technician location. Implement marker click handlers to show technician details in an info window. Include proper error handling for map loading failures and missing coordinates. The component should be responsive and integrate with the existing UI design system.

Integrate the TechnicianMap component into the search results view. Add a toggle state to switch between list view and map view. Display the map when technicians are found and have valid GPS coordinates. Ensure the map receives the filtered technician results from the search query. Maintain existing zip code validation and search functionality while adding the map display option.

Create a custom hook that manages Google Maps API loading state using the @react-google-maps/api useLoadScript hook. Handle API key configuration, loading errors, and provide a clean interface for components to check if the Maps API is ready. Include error states for missing API keys or loading failures.

Create a configuration file for Google Maps settings including default map center, zoom levels, marker styles, and map options. Export constants for map dimensions, marker icons, and info window styling to maintain consistency across map components.

requirements.summary: Add a map icon button in the bottom navigation or header that toggles the Google Maps view for technician locations
acceptanceCriteria: Icon button is clearly visible and accessible
Clicking the icon shows/hides the map view
Icon uses an appropriate map or location symbol

file_operations.description: Add a map toggle button to the TechnicianFinder component UI using a Map icon from lucide-react. Position the button prominently near the search input or results header. Implement toggle functionality to switch between list and map views. Style the button to match existing UI patterns and ensure it's disabled when no technicians are found or when technicians lack GPS coordinates. Show appropriate visual feedback for the active view state.
